scope: Bodhi homepage — responsive (mobile + desktop). Existing build at apps/web/src/app/page.tsx with 11 sections; this run is to compare the build against Figma and close gaps.
instructions: First compare what's already built at apps/web/src/app/page.tsx against the Figma frames. Produce a gap analysis BEFORE building. Then decompose only the missing/divergent parts. Build component-by-component with tests at each step. Mobile = 19-1470, Desktop = 1-32. Use Bodhi design tokens. Visual-QA at desktop + mobile.
